title: Subnautica Flow
description: The mod adds content from subnautica and subnautica below zero
body:
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79dc1e96ecadcd93e27ab699b0442d5b553b2299.png)
Dive into the depths of Minecraft with the Subnautica Flow Mod! Explore a whole new underwater world filled with the iconic creatures and environments from Subnautica.

 

 Encounter the majestic Reefbacks, mesmerizing Jellyrays, and more as you navigate through the ocean depths.

 

Face off against dangerous predators, navigate treacherous underwater caves, and uncover the secrets hidden beneath the ocean floor.

 

Pets 

New Blocks

New Creatures

New Baktiria

New Structures
